description: Add Advanced Hover Effects settings (15 new settings for Area 2) and Navigation & Typography settings (17 new settings for Area 3) to the mega-navigation section schema. Total: 32 new settings covering underline styles, animation variants, scale effects, background highlights, menu spacing, font controls, and dropdown typography.
steps: STEP 1 - Add 15 Hover Effects settings to sections/mega-navigation.liquid schema under a new 'Advanced Hover Effects' header. Settings: mn_hover_underline_style (select: solid/dashed/dotted/double, default solid), mn_hover_underline_position (select: bottom/middle/top, default bottom), mn_hover_underline_width (select: full-width/text-width/custom-px, default text-width), mn_hover_underline_custom_width (range 10-100 step 5 default 50), mn_hover_underline_offset (range 0-10 step 1 default 0), mn_hover_anim_style (select: center-expand/left-to-right/right-to-left/fade-in/grow-from-dot/slide-bounce, default center-expand), mn_hover_text_color (color #000000), mn_hover_scale (checkbox false), mn_hover_scale_amount (range 100-110 step 1 default 105 - represents 1.00 to 1.10, divide by 100 in CSS), mn_hover_bg_highlight (checkbox false), mn_hover_bg_color (color #F5F5F5), mn_hover_bg_radius (range 0-20 step 2 default 4), mn_hover_easing (select: ease/ease-in-out/cubic-bezier-smooth/bounce/elastic, default ease), mn_active_indicator (select: underline/background/bold/border-left/dot, default underline), mn_active_color (color #000000).

STEP 2 - Add 17 Navigation & Typography settings to sections/mega-navigation.liquid schema under a new 'Navigation & Typography' header. Settings: mn_item_spacing (range 0-40 step 2 default 0), mn_item_padding_h (range 8-32 step 2 default 20), mn_item_padding_v (range 8-24 step 2 default 16), mn_line_height (range 10-20 step 1 default 14 - divide by 10 for actual value), mn_font_family_style (select: body/heading/monospace, default body), mn_word_spacing (range 0-5 step 1 default 0), mn_dropdown_heading_size (range 12-20 step 1 default 13), mn_dropdown_heading_weight (select: 500/600/700/800, default 700), mn_dropdown_heading_transform (select: none/uppercase/capitalize, default uppercase), mn_dropdown_heading_spacing (range 0-4 step 1 default 1), mn_dropdown_link_size (range 12-18 step 1 default 14), mn_dropdown_link_weight (select: 400/500/600, default 400), mn_dropdown_link_line_height (range 14-24 step 2 default 16 - divide by 10 for actual value), mn_dropdown_link_hover_indent (range 0-10 step 1 default 0), mn_show_description (checkbox false), mn_separator_style (select: none/dot/pipe/slash/dash, default none), mn_separator_color (color #CCCCCC).

STEP 3 - Add CSS variables for all 32 new settings in the mega-navigation.liquid Liquid style block. For mn_hover_scale_amount: output as calc({{ section.settings.mn_hover_scale_amount }} / 100). For mn_line_height: output as calc({{ section.settings.mn_line_height }} / 10). For mn_dropdown_link_line_height: output as calc({{ section.settings.mn_dropdown_link_line_height }} / 10).
STEP 4 - Add data attributes on .mega-navigation-section for: data-mn-hover-anim-style, data-mn-active-indicator, data-mn-separator-style, data-mn-font-family.

STEP 5 - Update assets/mega-navigation.css with hover effect implementations: (a) Underline style variants (border-style on ::after). (b) Underline position (bottom/middle uses top:50%/top:0). (c) Underline width modes. (d) 6 animation styles including right-to-left, grow-from-dot (width from 0 centered), slide-bounce (with overshoot). (e) Scale effect on hover (transform: scale(var)). (f) Background highlight on hover (background-color with border-radius). (g) 5 easing functions mapped to cubic-bezier values. (h) Active item indicators (5 variants). (i) Hover text color change.

STEP 6 - Update assets/mega-navigation.css with typography implementations: (a) Item spacing via gap on .mega-nav-menu. (b) Item padding from vars. (c) Line height from var. (d) Font family style selector (var(--font-body-family)/var(--font-heading-family)/monospace). (e) Word spacing. (f) Dropdown heading styles (size, weight, transform, letter-spacing from vars). (g) Dropdown link styles (size, weight, line-height from vars). (h) Hover indent on dropdown links (padding-left transition). (i) Separator between nav items (::before or ::after pseudo-elements with content based on style). (j) Separator color.

STEP 7 - Update the data-mn-hover-animation attribute usage in CSS to support the 6 new animation styles alongside the existing 3 (center-expand, left-to-right, fade). Rename existing attribute references to use the new mn_hover_anim_style setting name.
STEP 8 - Validate schemas, CSS balance, and verify new CSS variables are referenced correctly.
acceptance_criteria: mega-navigation.liquid schema contains 32 additional settings (running total from FEAT-002: 68 + 32 = 100 non-header settings)
All new range settings have valid defaults (divisible by step from min)
Hover underline style renders as dashed/dotted/double when selected (border-style on ::after)
Scale effect applies transform:scale() on hover when enabled
Background highlight adds a colored background with border-radius on hover
Active item has 5 distinct visual indicators based on setting
Menu items are separated by chosen separator character (dot/pipe/slash/dash)
Dropdown heading and link typography respects all new size/weight/spacing settings
Dropdown links indent on hover when mn_dropdown_link_hover_indent > 0
All JSON schemas parse without errors
verification: Run: python3 -c "import json; schema=open('sections/mega-navigation.liquid').read().split('{% schema %}')[1].split('{% endschema %}')[0]; data=json.loads(schema); settings=[s for s in data['settings'] if s.get('type') != 'header']; print(f'Section settings count: {len(settings)}'); assert len(settings) >= 90, f'Expected >= 90, got {len(settings)}'"
Run: python3 -c "css=open('assets/mega-navigation.css').read(); assert css.count('{') == css.count('}'), f'Unbalanced: {css.count("{")} vs {css.count("}")}'; print('CSS OK')"

Run: python3 -c "css=open('assets/mega-navigation.css').read(); assert 'grow-from-dot' in css; assert 'slide-bounce' in css; assert 'hover-indent' in css or 'hover_indent' in css or 'padding-left' in css; print('Hover + Typography CSS patterns found')"
findings: Settings count reached 97 (target was >= 90). All CSS balanced, JSON schemas valid. Added --mn-hover-easing CSS var to Liquid style block for easing resolution pattern used in CSS.
